optionA: accidentally send a flirty text to the wrong person
optionB: have your search history read aloud at dinner

optionA: have someone know exactly what you're thinking at all times
optionB: have them be completely impossible to read

optionA: accidentally call your date by your pet's name
optionB: call your pet by your date's name for the rest of its life

optionA: be with someone who is deeply romantic but absolutely terrible at surprises
optionB: be with someone who is spontaneous but never romantic

optionA: accidentally 'like' a very old photo while scrolling someone's profile
optionB: accidentally send them a screenshot of their own profile

optionA: be incredibly charming but only when you're nervous
optionB: be incredibly charming only when you're calm and it comes across as suspiciously smooth

optionA: spill your drink on someone you're attracted to
optionB: have them spill theirs on you, but make it worse by jumping back

optionA: receive a love letter handwritten in terrible penmanship but genuinely heartfelt
optionB: receive a perfectly typed letter that's clearly been proofread four times but feels slightly corporate

optionA: sneeze loudly during a quiet, intimate moment
optionB: accidentally laugh at the absolutely wrong time

optionA: always be the one who says 'I love you' first
optionB: always be the one who says it second but more dramatically

optionA: have a crush who definitely knows you like them but says nothing
optionB: have a crush who definitely doesn't know but makes every interaction accidentally perfect

optionA: accidentally show up to a date overdressed by a significant amount
optionB: show up dramatically underdressed and have to own it

optionA: confidently mispronounce a word you've only read and never heard spoken
optionB: mishear something they said and respond to the wrong thing entirely

optionA: have a partner who brings you flowers randomly on a Wednesday for no reason
optionB: have a partner who plans one perfect, elaborate romantic gesture per year

optionA: have someone be immediately, completely honest about liking you
optionB: have them leave just enough ambiguity to keep you guessing for three weeks

optionA: get someone's number but immediately lose the paper it was written on
optionB: save their number wrong in your phone and not realize until you've already texted twice

optionA: have your most embarrassing moment witnessed by one person you really like
optionB: have your second most embarrassing moment go viral online

optionA: always fall asleep before your partner during movie nights
optionB: always stay awake and have to pretend you didn't notice them asleep on your shoulder

optionA: accidentally FaceTime someone instead of calling them
optionB: have them accidentally pocket-dial you during a conversation about you

optionA: have a partner who always makes reservations weeks in advance for your favorite places
optionB: have a partner who is somehow always friends with the chef and gets you in anyway

optionA: give an incredibly smooth compliment that surprises even yourself
optionB: give a sincere, slightly awkward compliment that somehow lands better

optionA: discover you have an embarrassing mutual friend who has definitely told them a story about you
optionB: discover they already follow you on social media from three years ago and never mentioned it

optionA: develop an accidental catchphrase that everyone you date remembers you by
optionB: be completely forgettable for the first three dates and then suddenly completely unforgettable

optionA: have a partner who absolutely cannot keep a secret about good news
optionB: have a partner who keeps every secret perfectly but visibly looks like they're holding one

optionA: be caught talking to yourself by someone you're trying to impress
optionB: be caught making a dramatic face in a reflection while they're watching
